$comment: Security rules for all published Cedar artifacts. Requires PR + ADR to change.

internal.$comment: Full fidelity. Used for review drafts only — never committed externally.

external.$comment: Scrubbed copy committed to docs/releases/ and published.

blocklist.$comment: Patterns that must never appear in any published artifact.
blocklist.action: redact and flag as agent-note before any publish step

agentNoteGate.$comment: Unresolved agent-notes must be resolved before promoting draft to published.
agentNoteGate.warnMessage: N unresolved agent-notes found. Resolve or explicitly dismiss before publishing.

immutability.$comment: Published release records are immutable. Corrections append a new record.
